evidence.mass_policy: block normalized-character count; minimum mass unit 1
evidence.page_geometry: page boxes stacked vertically and normalized by max page count

block_transport.interpretation: Exact optimal transport over extracted text blocks. This is an LTSim-inspired, fully specified adaptation—not the published LTSim implementation or a semantic table/formula metric. Report geometry and content costs separately with the flows.

canvas.interpretation: Canvas/page-size mismatch only; no token layout residual is folded into this axis.

content.interpretation: Strict NFC preservation is the primary text view. NFKC is reported separately as a compatibility view for ligature/encoding equivalence; it never hides the strict mismatch.

evidence.normalization: Unicode NFKC; case preserved; multiset comparison

critical_content.interpretation: Exact critical-symbol inventories prevent visually small numeric or operator errors from disappearing inside a document-level text average. Empty inventories are reported as exact but do not establish construct applicability.

figures.reason: Applicability for figures was not established by source metadata.

formulas.reason: Applicability for formulas was not established by source metadata.

geometry.interpretation: Token boxes are normalized by each page's own canvas; canvas mismatch remains a separate axis.

layout_relations.interpretation: Transparent matched-block relation trial inspired by pairwise-layout work; this is not the published PaIRS or LTSim metric.

pagination.interpretation: Page count, matched-block page assignment, and page-break boundaries are reported independently.

raster_ink.interpretation: Candidate pages are resized to the reference canvas, then optionally translation-registered. Use canvas and geometry axes for layout claims.

pages.reason: Ordinary same-grid SSIM is invalid when physical page canvases differ.

raster_perceptual.interpretation: SSIM is reported before and after translation-only registration. The multiscale value is the documented geometric mean of four SSIM scales, not canonical MS-SSIM. No candidate resizing is performed; SSIM abstains when physical canvases/grids differ.

candidate_text: 𝐾 for 𝐾≥2 an integer. We present evidence for their existence by constructing modular invariant partition functions and
reference_text: We propose possible new string theories based on local world-sheet symmetries corresponding to extensions of the Virasor

reading_order.interpretation: Kendall tau is computed only on content-matched blocks; coverage must accompany it.

tables.reason: Applicability for tables was not established by source metadata.

evidence.match_policy: exact Unicode-NFKC word text with deterministic page/position assignment for repeats

text_grounding.interpretation: Digital-PDF exact-word grounding adaptation; it is not the published CLEval algorithm. Split/merge values remain null until a validated implementation exists.

evidence.equations: uniform mass; delta_bbox=(1+GIoU)/2; delta_label=1 for text; mu=1-(delta_bbox+delta_label)/2; Text-LTSim=exp(-EMD), sigma=1

text_ltsim.interpretation: Faithful published LTSim equations on extracted text blocks only. It measures text-layout geometry/segmentation, not full semantic layout; non-text classes abstain.

typography.interpretation: Raw PDF font observables are diagnostic; font names and flags are renderer metadata, not perceptual truth.

configuration.normalization: Unicode NFKC, soft-hyphen removal, collapsed whitespace; case preserved

evaluator.name: pdf_metric_axes_v2
evaluator.policy: No compensatory scalar. Report raw axes, coverage, abstentions, and localized evidence.
